name: Handmade Pesto
recipeIngredient: 5 cups basil leaves, chilled and perfectly dry
3/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Toast pine nuts on a baking sheet for about 4 minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. Coarsely chop basil leaves. In a large mortar, combine the basil and garlic and pound to a coarse paste. Add the toasted nuts and pound until a smooth paste forms. Stir in the Parmesan, then 3/4 cup of the olive oil. Transfer the pesto to a bowl and season with salt and pepper.
4. Smooth the surface and pour a little olive oil on top to seal.
Notes: Pounding the ingredients in a mortar produces a pesto of incomparable texture: silky basil leaves and olive oil bind coarser bits of garlic and Parmesan. MAKES ABOUT 1 1/2 CUPS
